cheats: Level select: At title screen, hold A + B + X + Y + Left + Right simultaneously.
Unlock Star Road: Complete level 1-4 without exiting.
Pause glitch: Press Start + Select to pause mid-jump.
builds/guides: Yoshi's Island: Get Yoshi first for easier navigation.
Found路径: Collect all 96 exits for true ending.
Special Zone: Available after defeating Bowser.
Power-ups: Cape Feather is most versatile power-up.
bosses: Bowser (Castle 8) - Hit back his fireballs with cape.
Iggy Koopa (Castle 1) - Jump on or cape spin.
Roy Koopa (Castle 2) - Wait for piranha to retract.
Wendy Koopa (Castle 3) - Jump over ring and attack.
Morton Koopa (Castle 5) - Ground pound the bridge.
Lemmy Koopa (Castle 6) - Hit all balls simultaneously.
Ludwig von Koopa (Castle 7) - Use cape to deflect fire.
secrets: Star Road: 5 hidden levels with special exits.
Hidden 1-Up blocks: Yellow ! blocks above certain coins.
Flame ghost ride: Stand on platform edge for speed.
Moon (Secret) - Ride Yoshi into clouds in certain levels.
tips: Cape Feather makes most levels trivial.
Use P-switches for hidden areas and 1-Ups.
Chain chomps: Wait for chain to retract before passing.
Ghost house exits: Study patterns for faster times.
Yellow Koopas: Feed to Yoshi for colored eggs.
